structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-16 Benchmark Coupon & Reprice Threshold update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-16 16:23:55-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Due to market conditions, NOVA’s benchmark coupon will be updated effective 10/17/25 to accommodate the shift in the locked pipeline.  The benchmark coupon will shift from the UMBS30 5.5 to the 5.  A sample grid from the daily commentary has been provided below for reference.

 

Additionally, effective 10/17/25 the Capital Markets’ threshold for reprices will be reduced from 0.1875 to 0.125.  

 



 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
